title: License + attribution audit of full release bundle (0-violation gate)
context: M4 final compliance gate. Zero license/access violations are required before the release ships. Binding cancer guardrails apply: ONLY open-access / aggregate / de-identified public data; controlled-access (dbGaP, EGA, individual-level biobanks) and any identifiable patient data are out of scope; not medical advice; when in doubt, stop and surface. No partner/beneficiary is secured yet, so verifiedNeed is false.
objective: Conduct the license + attribution audit of the full release bundle, enforcing a 0-violation gate.
acceptanceCriteria: Per-source attribution + license correct; mixed/non-redistributable data is link-only, not re-hosted.
0 license/access violations (CR audit); release reproducible by an independent runner.
Audit result recorded with CR sign-off.
